text:
(3) The court officer will serve notice of the hearing referred to at paragraph (2)(b) on the parties to the proceedings.


(4) The court must, in writing—


(5) The court may with the consent of all the parties deal with any question as to the jurisdiction of the court, or as to whether the proceedings should be stayed, without a hearing. ]


F78 (6) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

F76 Rules 9.26A(1)(a)-(d) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 8(9)(a) (with reg. 23 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(b) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


F77 Rule 9.26A(1)(e) and word inserted (20.12.2012) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 4) Rules 2012 (S.I. 2012/2806) , rules 1 , 12(b)


F78 Rule 9.26A(6) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 8(9)(b) (with reg. 23 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(b) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)
